title: Numeric Boxplots By Disease Class
objective: Compare numeric predictors between disease-absent and disease-present classes.
method: Rendered boxplots of numeric features by the derived binary target.
results: Disease-present median thalach is 128.0 vs absent 151.0.
Disease-present median oldpeak is 1.1 vs absent 0.0.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
